budget.item: Pepperfry Modena White Banswara Marble Top 6 Seater Dining Set
Urban Ladder Dune Solid Oak Wood 6-Seater Dining Table
Philips Hue Play White & Color Ambiance Smart Bar Light (2 Pack)
Tp-Link Tapo L900-5 Smart Wi-Fi Light Strip (5m)

legal.detail: Submit a standard renovation NOC form to the apartment association 7 days prior, specifying work scope and contractor details.
Obtain approval for high-load wiring for smart LED accents and home gym AC, with a certificate from a licensed electrician.
Adhere strictly to society-mandated work hours (typically 9:00 AM to 6:00 PM, no Sundays or national holidays).

legal.step: Debris Chute and Waste Disposal Plan
legal.detail: Submit a plan for daily debris bagging and off-site disposal using society-approved vendor routes.
Structural modifications of load-bearing walls are strictly prohibited; layout must remain within the original footprint.

rooms.spec:
Open-concept layout merging living and dining spaces with a sleek charcoal and oak palette.
Hero element: A floating wood TV panel with recessed, app-controlled RGBIC LED strip backlight accents.

Symmetrical layout with a premium king bed flanked by smart bedside consoles in a deep navy and matte gold palette.
Hero element: A floor-to-ceiling upholstered headboard with integrated warm-white vertical LED profile lights.

Space-saving layout featuring a wall-mounted fold-out study desk and sleek wardrobes in a light ash and sage green palette.
Hero element: An acoustic slat wall panel behind the bed with hidden ambient cove lighting.

High-durability layout with heavy-duty interlocking rubber flooring in an industrial matte black and neon blue palette.
Hero element: A full-height mirrored wall flanked by smart vertical LED pillars tracking workout ambiance.

Parallel modular layout with scratch-resistant acrylic cabinets in a modern metallic grey and white quartz palette.
Hero element: An under-cabinet touchless hand-wave-activated LED strip lighting system over the main countertop.

Clean demarcated dual-bay layout with epoxy-coated flooring in a futuristic slate grey and safety yellow palette.
Hero element: A smart sensor-activated, overhead LED linear lighting array indicating charging bay readiness.
